title: oxalis stricta var. lejeunei
intro: Oxalis stricta var. lejeunei, also known as woodland sorrel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the wood sorrel family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its high levels of oxalic acid, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oxalis stricta var. lejeunei include its potential to help treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it may also be used in salves or ointments to take advantage of its topical properties.
